tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text: Modern medicine has changed our lives in ways that once seemed 1.1. _________ . A hundred years ago, an infected wound could be deadly, but the 1.2. _________ of penicillin gave doctors a powerful new weapon against bacteria. Today, 1.3. _________ research continues to produce remarkable results. Vaccines, for example, offer strong 1.4. _________ against diseases that used to kill millions of children every year. Doctors can now 1.5. _________ treat many illnesses that were hopeless in the past, so patients who once had no chance are often 1.6. _________ to make a full recovery. Of course, no medicine is completely harmless; some drugs can be 1.7. _________ if they are taken in the wrong amount. That is why careful 1.8. _________ , combined with regular checks, remains essential for every patient.
